headline: Is RCL Turning the Corner on Mediterranean Booking Weakness?
summary: Royal Caribbean sees Mediterranean bookings rebound after Q1 disruption, but limited summer inventory may cap near-term 2026 yield upside.

headline: Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of cruise company Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) jumped 4.3% in the morning session after a company director, Stephen Pagliuca, disclosed a significant purchase of company stock, signaling strong insider confidence.
